market_overview.headline: Both SPY and QQQ are showing bearish unstacked EMA structure while 313 stocks (31.3%) remain in Full Bear mode.
market_overview.detail: Only 27% of stocks are Full Bull despite energy and materials showing strength. BTC's Full Bear signal at -43.8% from fair value adds risk-off pressure to the entire market.

reversal_candidates.headline: Bear Rally Reversal Candidates With Bullish Crossover Alerts

momentum_themes.headline: Memory/Storage Semiconductor Momentum Acceleration
momentum_themes.detail: Memory and storage semiconductor names dominate momentum leaders with WDC, MU, and SNDK showing exceptional spread scores. Electronic technology sector showing bifurcation between memory strength and broader chip weakness.

sector_analysis.headline: Energy Dominance vs Tech/Finance Weakness

strongest.note: Perfect bullish score with all 11 names in Full Bull structure.
Small but perfect bullish sector showing industrial strength.
Mining and materials showing pure pullback structure, no breakdowns.

weakest.note: Massive tech wreckage with 90.5% of names in bearish structure.
Banking sector under pressure with 60% bearish despite some energy financing benefits.
Complete sector breakdown though small sample size of only 2 names.

sector_analysis.detail: Clear commodity/energy vs growth tech rotation underway. Energy minerals showing perfect 100% bullish structure while tech services seeing 90.5% bearish readings.

items.text: Both SPY and QQQ in bearish EMA structure with potential for further breakdown
BTC Full Bear at -43.8% from fair value signals broad risk-off environment
Technology services sector showing 90.5% bearish structure - avoid catching falling knives
High volume pullback in ADTTF (5.71x average) suggests institutional distribution
